eval_name: Finish runs quality gates before committing
prompt: We're done for today. I made code changes to internal/api/server.go and added a new test file. Let's wrap up.

assertions.text: Output runs the test suite (make test) BEFORE attempting git commit
Output runs the build (make build) to verify compilation
Output does NOT skip Phase 2 quality gates since code was changed

eval_name: Finish captures remaining work as arc issues
prompt: We finished ARC-5.1 and ARC-5.2 but didn't get to ARC-5.3. We also discovered a bug in the token refresh logic that needs separate work.

assertions.text: Output creates an arc issue for the discovered token refresh bug
Output updates ARC-5.3 with progress context for the next session
Output closes ARC-5.1 and ARC-5.2 with resolution summaries

eval_name: Finish stages specific files, not git add -A
prompt: Time to commit. We changed 4 files in internal/api/ and added a new test file.

assertions.text: Output stages files by specific name (git add <file1> <file2> ...) NOT git add -A or git add .
Output uses a conventional commit message format (feat/fix/refactor scope prefix)

eval_name: Finish pushes to remote — work is not done until pushed
prompt: I've committed the changes. Are we done?

assertions.text: Output runs git push (not just commit)
Output verifies push succeeded with git status
Output does NOT declare session complete before push succeeds

eval_name: Finish blocks on test failure — does not skip to commit
prompt: Running the test suite before wrapping up. Result: 2 tests failed in TestOAuthCallback.

assertions.text: Output does NOT proceed to git commit while tests are failing
Output invokes debug or implement skill to fix the failures
Output re-runs tests after the fix before proceeding to commit

eval_name: Finish skips quality gates when no code changed
prompt: This session was all issue triage and planning — no code changes. Let's wrap up.

assertions.text: Output skips Phase 2 quality gates (no make test, no make build) since no code was changed
Output still updates arc issues and captures any remaining work
